{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Key Account Supervisor",
  "description": "PZ Cussons is a dynamic consumer products group and innovator of some of the world&#39;s best known and loved brands. Calling on over 130 years of expertise, we operate internationally in carefully selected developed and emerging markets that present the greatest strategic potential for future growth. Our world-class supply chain and distribution networks enable us to meet our global consumer needs and deliver quality brands that add value and enhance everyday lives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Key Account Supervisor

Job Requisition ID: JR002922
Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-Time

Responsibilities


	Achieve agreed business objectives/KPIs for the territory (Sell-in, sell-out, Focus Category, NPD listing and promotions)
	&nbsp;Achieve sales drivers&rsquo; objectives for the territory viz (Distribution, Visibility, Price and Promotion)
	Managing territories with potential to deliver a minimum of 1B per annum
	Plan to deliver customer-based and territory-based agreed sales (NIV and Category) targets periodically and ensure MoM and YoY growth
	Analyze and review distributors&rsquo; performance against agreed KPIs
	Work with the ZM to develop JBP of customers in assigned territory
	Ensure bi-weekly stocktaking in order to protect company resources
	Tracking of distributor performance payments (including posting and matching), monthly account reconciliation/signing off, repayment plans linked to capability development
	Ensure collection of outstanding debt within the stipulated time frame and accompany same with sell-in of depleted SKUs
	Adherence to monthly journey plan for customers&rsquo; contact and engagement
	Ensure compliance with retail operating standards in all showrooms
	Organize and coordinate activities of floor sales merchandizers
	Implement strict credit control for Key distributors and ensure purchases are made within approved credit limit
	Accountable for POS materials and other sales-driving materials deployed to the territory through monitoring to ensure safe keeping and optimal use.
	Actively lead or participate in Quality Management System implementation and sustenance in all assigned duties.
	Ensure no waste of resources or pollution of the environment while fulfilling assigned responsibilities.
	Ensure safety management sustenance.
	Actively lead or participate in Quality Management System implementation and sustenance in all assigned duties.
	Support Implementation of ISO 45001. (OHS)
	And any other task assigned.


Qualifications


	First Degree in any discipline
	Computer Literacy


Experience: (What experience brings success to this role)


	Minimum of 1-2 years of experience in marketing or sales, and over this period has successfully delivered on KPIs.
	Direct experience of PZ Cussons Way of selling capabilities with a focus on Sales Driver execution at the point of purchase (QDVP), Outlet Segmentation and Managing Relationships, including structured call, persuasive selling and brand passion.
	Experience in an electrical-related company is an added advantage.


Knowledge: (What does the person need to know)


	Good knowledge of business objectives and priorities.
	Experienced driver with valid license
	Knowledge of Field Sales Management and Market Intelligence.
	PZ Cussons Leadership competencies- BEST values


Functional or Technical / Business Skills: (What can the holder do)


	Commercial Acumen&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Emerging
	Customer Management&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Emerging
	Negotiation Skills&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Emerging
	In-market Execution&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Emerging
	Selling Skills&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Emerging
	Sales Drivers&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Emerging
	Channel Strategy&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Emerging
	Communication/Interpersonal Skills Developed
	IT Skills&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Developed&nbsp;&nbsp;
",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-04",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "PZ Cussons"
    
  },

Key Account Supervisor Job at PZ Cussons




        
    

        
        PZ Cussons is a dynamic consumer products group and innovator of some of the world's best known and loved brands. Calling on over 130 years of expertise, we operate internationally in carefully selected developed and emerging markets that present the greatest strategic potential for future growth. Our world-class supply chain and distribution networks enable us to meet our global consumer needs and deliver quality brands that add value and enhance everyday lives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Key Account Supervisor

Job Requisition ID: JR002922
Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-Time

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Achieve agreed business objectives/KPIs for the territory (Sell-in, sell-out, Focus Category, NPD listing and promotions)
	 Achieve sales drivers’ objectives for the territory viz (Distribution, Visibility, Price and Promotion)
	Managing territories with potential to deliver a minimum of 1B per annum
	Plan to deliver customer-based and territory-based agreed sales (NIV and Category) targets periodically and ensure MoM and YoY growth
	Analyze and review distributors’ performance against agreed KPIs
	Work with the ZM to develop JBP of customers in assigned territory
	Ensure bi-weekly stocktaking in order to protect company resources
	Tracking of distributor performance payments (including posting and matching), monthly account reconciliation/signing off, repayment plans linked to capability development
	Ensure collection of outstanding debt within the stipulated time frame and accompany same with sell-in of depleted SKUs
	Adherence to monthly journey plan for customers’ contact and engagement
	Ensure compliance with retail operating standards in all showrooms
	Organize and coordinate activities of floor sales merchandizers
	Implement strict credit control for Key distributors and ensure purchases are made within approved credit limit
	Accountable for POS materials and other sales-driving materials deployed to the territory through monitoring to ensure safe keeping and optimal use.
	Actively lead or participate in Quality Management System implementation and sustenance in all assigned duties.
	Ensure no waste of resources or pollution of the environment while fulfilling assigned responsibilities.
	Ensure safety management sustenance.
	Actively lead or participate in Quality Management System implementation and sustenance in all assigned duties.
	Support Implementation of ISO 45001. (OHS)
	And any other task assigned.


Qualifications


	First Degree in any discipline
	Computer Literacy


Experience: (What experience brings success to this role)


	Minimum of 1-2 years of experience in marketing or sales, and over this period has successfully delivered on KPIs.
	Direct experience of PZ Cussons Way of selling capabilities with a focus on Sales Driver execution at the point of purchase (QDVP), Outlet Segmentation and Managing Relationships, including structured call, persuasive selling and brand passion.
	Experience in an electrical-related company is an added advantage.


Knowledge: (What does the person need to know)


	Good knowledge of business objectives and priorities.
	Experienced driver with valid license
	Knowledge of Field Sales Management and Market Intelligence.
	PZ Cussons Leadership competencies- BEST values


Functional or Technical / Business Skills: (What can the holder do)


	Commercial Acumen                        Emerging
	Customer Management                    Emerging
	Negotiation Skills                            Emerging
	In-market Execution                        Emerging
	Selling Skills                                   Emerging
	Sales Drivers                                  Emerging
	Channel Strategy                            Emerging
	Communication/Interpersonal Skills Developed
	IT Skills                                         Developed  
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing Manager",
  "description": "ICS Outsourcing is Nigeria&rsquo;s leading Outsourcing provider incorporated in August 1994. We offer a comprehensive range of outsourcing services ranging from People Outsourcing to Sales BPO. We provide bespoke Business Support Solutions to all kinds and sizes of business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Manager

Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Agrochemical

Role Summary


	To build and lead the company&rsquo;s digital presence from the ground up, driving brand awareness, lead generation, and revenue growth across Nigeria&rsquo;s agricultural ecosystem.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement a full-scale digital marketing strategy aligned with business goals
	Manage website, social media platforms, and online brand positioning
	Plan and execute paid campaigns (Google Ads, Meta Ads, etc.)
	Drive lead generation campaigns targeting distributors, agro-dealers, and farmers
	Coordinate with branch teams for localized campaigns
	Develop seasonal campaigns aligned with planting cycles
	Oversee content strategy (product education, farmer awareness, promotions)
	Monitor analytics (traffic, conversions, ROI) and optimize campaigns
	Manage marketing budget and ensure cost efficiency
	Explore digital channels relevant to rural/agricultural markets.


KPIs


	Lead generation &amp; conversion rates
	Website and social growth
	Campaign ROI
	Brand visibility.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree
	5+ years of digital marketing experience
	Strong expertise in SEO, SEM, social media, and analytics tools
	Experience in FMCG, agriculture, or distribution preferred
	Industry experience in agrochemicals, fertilizers, Agro commodities, or distribution is highly preferred.

Digital Marketing Manager Job at ICS Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        ICS Outsourcing is Nigeria’s leading Outsourcing provider incorporated in August 1994. We offer a comprehensive range of outsourcing services ranging from People Outsourcing to Sales BPO. We provide bespoke Business Support Solutions to all kinds and sizes of business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Manager

Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Agrochemical

Role Summary
     

            
    




	To build and lead the company’s digital presence from the ground up, driving brand awareness, lead generation, and revenue growth across Nigeria’s agricultural ecosystem.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement a full-scale digital marketing strategy aligned with business goals
	Manage website, social media platforms, and online brand positioning
	Plan and execute paid campaigns (Google Ads, Meta Ads, etc.)
	Drive lead generation campaigns targeting distributors, agro-dealers, and farmers
	Coordinate with branch teams for localized campaigns
	Develop seasonal campaigns aligned with planting cycles
	Oversee content strategy (product education, farmer awareness, promotions)
	Monitor analytics (traffic, conversions, ROI) and optimize campaigns
	Manage marketing budget and ensure cost efficiency
	Explore digital channels relevant to rural/agricultural markets.


KPIs


	Lead generation & conversion rates
	Website and social growth
	Campaign ROI
	Brand visibility.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree
	5+ years of digital marketing experience
	Strong expertise in SEO, SEM, social media, and analytics tools
	Experience in FMCG, agriculture, or distribution preferred
	Industry experience in agrochemicals, fertilizers, Agro commodities, or distribution is highly preferred.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Content Creator",
  "description": "Multipro Consumer Products Limited is the largest company in Nigeria dealing in Sales, Haulage and Logistics. MCPL was founded in 1996 as a fully owned company of the Tolaram Group. The first product sold by MCPL in 1996 was Indomie and since then it has played a seminal role in making Indomie a household brand in Nigeria. MCPL over the years has grown adding 13 brands in various categories comprising of Noodle, Snacks, Milk, Cereal, Oil, Homecare and Personal Hygiene.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: FMCG

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative and results-driven Content Creator to develop engaging and impactful content across digital and traditional platforms.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating high-quality visual, written, and multimedia content that enhances brand visibility, drives audience engagement, and supports business objectives.
	The role requires a strong understanding of content trends, storytelling, social media management, and brand communication.


Job Responsibilities


	Develop and execute content strategies aligned with the company&#39;s marketing and communication objectives.
	Create engaging content for social media platforms, websites, blogs, newsletters, and other digital channels.
	Plan, produce, and edit high-quality videos, graphics, animations, and other multimedia content.
	Manage and maintain the company&rsquo;s social media presence across all relevant platforms.
	Develop content calendars and ensure timely delivery of content campaigns.
	Monitor social media trends, audience engagement, and industry best practices to optimize content performance.
	Collaborate with internal teams to create content that supports product launches, promotions, recruitment campaigns, and corporate initiatives.
	Write compelling captions, scripts, articles, and marketing copy that align with the brand voice.
	Track, analyze, and report content performance metrics to identify opportunities for improvement.
	Ensure consistency in branding, messaging, and visual identity across all content.
	Support internal communication initiatives through engaging multimedia content.
	Stay up-to-date with emerging content creation tools, technologies, and industry trends.


Job Requirements and Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Media Studies, Public Relations, English, or a related field.
	3+ years of experience in content creation, digital marketing, social media management, or a related role.
	Excellent writing, editing, proofreading, and storytelling skills.
	Proficiency in content creation tools such as Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar applications.
	Strong understanding of social media platforms, content trends, and audience engagement strategies.
	Experience in photography, videography, and video editing is an added advantage.
	Knowledge of SEO principles and content optimization techniques.
	Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret content performance metrics.
	Excellent communication, organizational, and project management skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.


Benefits


	Attractive Remuneration |Pension |HMO |Monthly Product Pack |13th Month Pay |Incentives |Leave Allowance.

Content Creator Job at Multipro Consumer Products Limited




        
    

        
        Multipro Consumer Products Limited is the largest company in Nigeria dealing in Sales, Haulage and Logistics. MCPL was founded in 1996 as a fully owned company of the Tolaram Group. The first product sold by MCPL in 1996 was Indomie and since then it has played a seminal role in making Indomie a household brand in Nigeria. MCPL over the years has grown adding 13 brands in various categories comprising of Noodle, Snacks, Milk, Cereal, Oil, Homecare and Personal Hygiene.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: FMCG

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a creative and results-driven Content Creator to develop engaging and impactful content across digital and traditional platforms.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating high-quality visual, written, and multimedia content that enhances brand visibility, drives audience engagement, and supports business objectives.
	The role requires a strong understanding of content trends, storytelling, social media management, and brand communication.


Job Responsibilities


	Develop and execute content strategies aligned with the company's marketing and communication objectives.
	Create engaging content for social media platforms, websites, blogs, newsletters, and other digital channels.
	Plan, produce, and edit high-quality videos, graphics, animations, and other multimedia content.
	Manage and maintain the company’s social media presence across all relevant platforms.
	Develop content calendars and ensure timely delivery of content campaigns.
	Monitor social media trends, audience engagement, and industry best practices to optimize content performance.
	Collaborate with internal teams to create content that supports product launches, promotions, recruitment campaigns, and corporate initiatives.
	Write compelling captions, scripts, articles, and marketing copy that align with the brand voice.
	Track, analyze, and report content performance metrics to identify opportunities for improvement.
	Ensure consistency in branding, messaging, and visual identity across all content.
	Support internal communication initiatives through engaging multimedia content.
	Stay up-to-date with emerging content creation tools, technologies, and industry trends.


Job Requirements and Skills


	Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Media Studies, Public Relations, English, or a related field.
	3+ years of experience in content creation, digital marketing, social media management, or a related role.
	Excellent writing, editing, proofreading, and storytelling skills.
	Proficiency in content creation tools such as Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar applications.
	Strong understanding of social media platforms, content trends, and audience engagement strategies.
	Experience in photography, videography, and video editing is an added advantage.
	Knowledge of SEO principles and content optimization techniques.
	Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret content performance metrics.
	Excellent communication, organizational, and project management skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.


Benefits


	Attractive Remuneration |Pension |HMO |Monthly Product Pack |13th Month Pay |Incentives |Leave Allowance.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Warehouse Manager",
  "description": "Multipro Consumer Products Limited is the largest company in Nigeria dealing in Sales, Haulage and Logistics. MCPL was founded in 1996 as a fully owned company of the Tolaram Group. The first product sold by MCPL in 1996 was Indomie and since then it has played a seminal role in making Indomie a household brand in Nigeria. MCPL over the years has grown adding 13 brands in various categories comprising of Noodle, Snacks, Milk, Cereal, Oil, Homecare and Personal Hygiene.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Manager
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Warehouse Manager will be responsible for the efficient management, coordination, and supervision of five (5) distinct warehouse facilities inside the premises : the Main Warehouse, Annex Warehouse, Hanger Warehouse, Nikko Warehouse, and the New Warehouse.
	This role ensures optimal inventory control, safe storage of raw materials and finished goods, timely dispatch, and compliance with health, safety, and quality standards across all locations.


Responsibilities
Operational Management:


	Oversee daily warehouse operations across all five warehouse locations (Main, Annex, Hanger, Nikko, and New Warehouse).
	Develop and implement standard operating procedures (SOPs) for receiving, storage, picking, packing, and dispatch.
	Ensure seamless coordination between warehouses to support production schedules / Planning and customer fulfilment.
	Monitor warehouse capacity utilization and recommend space optimization strategies.


Inventory Control and Management:


	Maintain accurate inventory records across all warehouses using inventory management systems.- (SAP integration )
	Conduct daily physical stock counts, cycle counts, and reconcile discrepancies with other related departments .
	Ensure FIFO (First-In, First-Out) and FEFO (First-Expired, First-Out) principles are strictly followed, particularly for raw materials and perishable goods.
	Minimize stock losses, damages, shrinkage, and wastage.


Team Leadership and Workforce Management:


	Train, supervise, and evaluate warehouse staff across all locations.
	Foster a culture of safety, accountability, and continuous improvement among warehouse teams.


Health, Safety, and Compliance:


	Enforce strict adherence to workplace health and safety regulations.
	Ensure proper handling and storage of raw materials (flour, palm oil, cartons , seasonings, wrappers ,other liquid stock , etc.) and finished noodle products.
	Conduct regular safety audits, risk assessments, and emergency drills with the HSE officer for emergency preparedness within the team .
	Maintain compliance with NAFDAC, SON, MANCAP and other relevant regulatory standards.
	Ensure fire safety systems, pest control, and hygiene standards are maintained.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 5 - 8 years of work experience.&nbsp;

Warehouse Manager Job at Multipro Consumer Products Limited




        
    

        
        Multipro Consumer Products Limited is the largest company in Nigeria dealing in Sales, Haulage and Logistics. MCPL was founded in 1996 as a fully owned company of the Tolaram Group. The first product sold by MCPL in 1996 was Indomie and since then it has played a seminal role in making Indomie a household brand in Nigeria. MCPL over the years has grown adding 13 brands in various categories comprising of Noodle, Snacks, Milk, Cereal, Oil, Homecare and Personal Hygiene.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Manager
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Warehouse Manager will be responsible for the efficient management, coordination, and supervision of five (5) distinct warehouse facilities inside the premises : the Main Warehouse, Annex Warehouse, Hanger Warehouse, Nikko Warehouse, and the New Warehouse.
	This role ensures optimal inventory control, safe storage of raw materials and finished goods, timely dispatch, and compliance with health, safety, and quality standards across all locations.


Responsibilities
Operational Management:


	Oversee daily warehouse operations across all five warehouse locations (Main, Annex, Hanger, Nikko, and New Warehouse).
	Develop and implement standard operating procedures (SOPs) for receiving, storage, picking, packing, and dispatch.
	Ensure seamless coordination between warehouses to support production schedules / Planning and customer fulfilment.
	Monitor warehouse capacity utilization and recommend space optimization strategies.


Inventory Control and Management:


	Maintain accurate inventory records across all warehouses using inventory management systems.- (SAP integration )
	Conduct daily physical stock counts, cycle counts, and reconcile discrepancies with other related departments .
	Ensure FIFO (First-In, First-Out) and FEFO (First-Expired, First-Out) principles are strictly followed, particularly for raw materials and perishable goods.
	Minimize stock losses, damages, shrinkage, and wastage.


Team Leadership and Workforce Management:


	Train, supervise, and evaluate warehouse staff across all locations.
	Foster a culture of safety, accountability, and continuous improvement among warehouse teams.


Health, Safety, and Compliance:


	Enforce strict adherence to workplace health and safety regulations.
	Ensure proper handling and storage of raw materials (flour, palm oil, cartons , seasonings, wrappers ,other liquid stock , etc.) and finished noodle products.
	Conduct regular safety audits, risk assessments, and emergency drills with the HSE officer for emergency preparedness within the team .
	Maintain compliance with NAFDAC, SON, MANCAP and other relevant regulatory standards.
	Ensure fire safety systems, pest control, and hygiene standards are maintained.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor's Degree with 5 - 8 years of work experience.
